tagline: You can now apply tags to Databricks apps to organize and categorize them.
what_it_does: You can now apply tags to Databricks apps to organize and categorize them. Search is not supported using Databricks apps tags. Preview This feature is in Public Preview.
why_it_matters: To add a governed tag, you must also have the ASSIGN permission on the governed tag.
plain_summary: You can now apply tags to Databricks apps to organize and categorize them. Search is not supported using Databricks apps tags.
key_takeaway: You can now apply tags to Databricks apps to organize and categorize them.
